summary: A recorded clip, posted by the account, of a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit and purple tie seated at the Resolute Desk in the Oval Office, hands folded, speaking to the camera. Behind him are military and American flags and framed photographs on the credenza. The framing is a single steady medium shot held across the sampled frames. No burned-in captions appear in the sampled frames.

script.scene: A man with white-gray hair in a dark suit sits at the Resolute Desk speaking to camera, with military flags and framed photos behind him.
The same medium shot of the seated speaker continues.
The speaker remains seated at the desk in the same framing near the end of the clip.
